_comment: ramen-bones-analytics is a SvelteKit + Cloudflare Pages app. The PostToolUse hook is for FAST per-edit verification against the local Vite dev server (bun run dev → http://localhost:5173). Do NOT point it at DEV — that requires a push + ~60s CF Pages deploy on every Svelte save, which destroys the feedback loop. The project rule in .claude/CLAUDE.md ('Always work against DEV unless the user says local or prod') applies to FINAL QA before reporting work complete, not the per-save hook nudge.
